name: mcp_server_good
note: A scoped MCP server. It exposes only the four operations the two agents need, each at one effect level, every write or destructive operation gated, and each operation declares an output cap at or under the host limit so no single result can flood context. The right operation is reachable and a high-impact action cannot run without passing the boundary.

operations.name: search_docs
operations.description: Search the internal documentation corpus and return matching passages. Read only, capped.

operations.name: export_corpus
operations.description: Export a bounded slice of the documentation corpus. Read only, capped below the host output limit.

operations.name: trigger_deploy
operations.description: Trigger a deployment. Requires authorization and confirmation.

operations.name: delete_environment
operations.description: Permanently delete a deployment environment. Requires authorization and confirmation.
